title: codereview-1: SFN delta section P2 test vector refs incomplete
description: After first edit chunk to SFN modulo section in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:376+, remaining references to nonexistent test/vectors/sfn-delta.json persist at top-level (line ~29, 364, 505). Update all to point to ccp16-desync.json:desync_on_sfn_wrap and ccp_load_balancing.json. Also P4: inconsistent spacing in 'delta=1' vs 'delta = 1'; use RFC 1982 full citation. Tagged codereview. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-hcwu
close_reason: Updated test vector refs to ccp16-desync.json:desync_on_sfn_wrap, ccp_load_balancing.json; fixed delta spacing and added RFC 1982 citation in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:52; matched doc style, no comments added; west build and cargo test passed
